description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Universal-Updater that builds and publishes the Universal-Updater project. The workflow triggers on push to all branches except translation, on pull requests to any branch, and on release creation. It uses an ubuntu-latest environment with a devKitARM container to build the project, and then publishes the build artifacts to a GitHub release and to the Universal-Team/extras repository. Additionally, it sends a Discord webhook notification on success or failure.
